list.title: Eleven services, one standard.
list.lead:
No pre-packaged bundles, no fixed price lists.
Every service is built around the real project after a discovery call.
list.pageTitle: Web & WordPress services. No blame shifting, measured results.
list.pageLead:
Four core verticals in the matrix (web design, e-commerce, web development, SEO), plus branding and three specific WordPress jobs (maintenance, support, migration).
One contact, no supplier chain, no project manager who cannot write code.
